title: best alms courses for promotion points
source_filename: best alms courses for promotion points.docx

prose.title: best alms courses for promotion points
prose.body:
The best online courses for promotion points in the Army are typically those that align with your Military Occupational Specialty (MOS) and demonstrate professional development in your field. Here are a few popular options:

1. Skillport: Skillport offers a wide range of courses across various specialties. Log in to AKO and access the Army eLearning portal to find a catalog of available courses.

2. Joint Knowledge Online (JKO): JKO offers a variety of courses, including the Army Correspondence Program, which can help you earn promotion points.

3. Army Training Network (ATN): ATN is an online resource that provides information, products, and services to support individual and unit training needs. They offer comprehensive training courses that can contribute to your professional development.

4. Army e-Learning: Army e-Learning is an interactive online resource that provides courses, certifications, and resources to help with career progression.

Remember to check with your unit's education office for specific guidance on which courses will earn promotion points based on your MOS and individual promotion requirements.
